entries.signature: public void Draw (SkiaSharp.SKCanvas canvas, SkiaSharp.SKPoint p, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws this surface's contents onto the specified canvas at the given point, using the specified sampling options.

params.canvas: The canvas on which to draw.
params.paint: The paint to apply, or <see langword="null" /> to draw with default settings.
params.sampling: The sampling options that control how pixels are filtered when drawing.
params.p: The point at which the top-left corner of the surface is placed on the canvas.

entries.signature: public void Draw (SkiaSharp.SKCanvas canvas, float x, float y, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws this surface's contents onto the specified canvas at the given coordinates, using the specified sampling options.

params.x: The x-coordinate at which the top-left corner of the surface is placed on the canvas.
params.canvas: The canvas on which to draw.
params.paint: The paint to apply, or <see langword="null" /> to draw with default settings.
params.sampling: The sampling options that control how pixels are filtered when drawing.
params.y: The y-coordinate at which the top-left corner of the surface is placed on the canvas.
